criteria.reason: Builder preview now separates service availability from route selection for route-required providers.
Google Sheets -> Telegram requires both binding routes before preview/activation.
Preflight merges selected resource config with selected provider route and blocks when route is missing.
Activation gate and post-create handoff now point route blockers to route selection.
Agents UI no longer auto-selects recommended routes and blocks creation until routes are selected and confirmed.
Full agent blueprint suite and diff check passed without schema migration.
Incomplete Google Sheets -> Telegram descriptions now produce blocking workflow-detail questions and cannot create an empty draft.
Production capability outputs include preflight, approval, ledger, limits, recovery, and side-effect contract evidence.
